children.heading: Construct
children.label: 1 Construct
children.text: The term “construct” means to construct, acquire, install, improve, or extend a facility or system.

children.heading: Cost of money loan
children.label: 2 Cost of money loan
children.text: The term “cost of money loan” means a loan made under this chapter bearing interest at a rate equal to the then current cost to the Federal Government of loans of similar maturity.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.heading: Rural area
children.label: 4 Rural area
children.text: The term “rural area” has the meaning given the term in .section 950bb(b)(3) of this title
